title: polybotrya acrostichoides
intro: Polybotrya acrostichoides, also known as the fern-like Polybotrya, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Polybotrya acrostichoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying and crushing the leaves, which can be used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
